Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

  • Class
    Description
    AbstractAllD
    Common implementation for the AllD, AllmpD and AllmtD reasoners.
    AbstractAllD.Input
     
    AbstractEmptyInputReasoner
     
    AbstractManualInference
     
    AbstrExpr
    This reasoner abstracts a given expression with a fresh free identifier.
    AbstrExpr.Input
    Extension of SingleExprInput that allows to also specify an optional name for the expression.
    AllD
     
    AllI
    Generates the introduction rule for universal quantification.
    AllI.Input
    An input containing an optional list of names.
    AllmpD
    Reasoner that instantiates a universally quantified implication and performs a modus ponens on it in one step.
    AllmtD
    Reasoner that instantiates a universally quantified implication and performs a modus tollens on it in one step.
    AutoImpF
    A reasoner that tries to infer new selected hypotheses using the current selected hypotheses and the implications that are present in the visible hypotheses.
    CardComparison
    Basic implementation for comparison of cardinalities
    CardUpTo
    Basic implementation for Cardinality of range of numbers "card(a..b)"
    Conj
     
    ConjF
    A reasoner that generates a forward inference to split a conjunctive hypothesis into its conjuncts and hides the original conjunction
    Contr
    Generates a proof rule to contradict the goal and falsify a given hypothesis simultaneously.
    ContradictionFinder
    Protocol for finding a hypothesis which is contradicted by some of the others
    ContradictionFinder.ContradictionInSequentFinder
    Find a hypothesis which is contradicted by the other hypotheses of a sequent (used in the automated tactic).
    ContradictionFinder.ContradictionInSetFinder
    Find a predicate which is contradicted by the other predicates of a set (used in the reasoner).
    ContrHyps
    Discharges a sequent that contains a hypothesis and its contradiction.
    ContrL1
    Generates a proof rule to contradict the goal and falsify a given hypothesis simultaneously.
    Cut
    Generates a 'cut' rule, introducing the given predicate as a hypothesis.
    DisjE
    Generates a proof rule to perform a case distinction on a hypothesis.
    DoCase
    Generates the proof rule for case distinction on the given predicate
    DTDistinctCase
    Makes a distinct case on simple (non inductive) datatypes.
    DTDistinctCase.Input
    An input adding an optional list of names to the super-class input.
    DTInduction
    Makes an induction on an inductive datatypes.
    DTReasonerHelper
    Helper class for reasoners about datatypes.
    Eq
     
    EqHe
    This class handles reasoners Eq and He.
    EqHe.Level
     
    EqL1
    Rewrites an equality and hides the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier.
    EqL2
    Rewrites an equality and hides or deselects the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier.
    Eqv
    Abstract class for equivalence rewriter
    EqvEq<T extends Formula<T>>
    Abstract class for Equivalence and Equality rewriter
    EqvLR
    Manual rewriter reasoner.
    EqvRL
    Manual rewriter reasoner.
    ExE
    Deprecated.
    use the reasoner ExF instead since it generates a forward inference instead
    ExF
    Reasoner that returns a forward inference to free existentially bound variables in a hypothesis.
    ExF.Input
    An input adding an optional list of names to the super-class input.
    ExI
     
    ExponentiationStep
    Rewriter for the definition of an exponentiation step.
    FalseHyp
     
    FiniteCompset
    Implementation of an inference reasoner on finiteness of set comprehension.

    FiniteFunction
     
    FiniteFunDom
     
    FiniteFunRan
     
    FiniteFunRelImg
     
    FiniteHypBoundedGoal
    Implementation for "min or max goal with finite hyp"
    FiniteInter
    Implementation of the "Finite of inter" reasoners.
    FiniteMax
    Basic implementation for "finite maximum"
    FiniteMin
    Basic implementation for "finite minimum"
    FiniteNegative
     
    FinitePositive
     
    FiniteRan
     
    FiniteRelation
     
    FiniteRelImg
     
    FiniteSet
     
    FiniteSetMinus
     
    FiniteUnion
    Implementation of the "Finite of union" reasoners.
    FunCompImg
    Basic implementation for "function apply to singleton set image" f[{E}]
    FunImageGoal
    Generates a proof rule that adds a hypothesis f(E) ∈ E2 if the sequent contains hypothesis f ∈ E1 op E2 and the goal contains expression f(E) in a WD-strict position.
    FunInterImg
    Basic implementation for Function Converse inference rule f~(f(E))
    FunOvr
     
    FunSetMinusImg
    Basic implementation for Function Converse inference rule f~(f(E))
    FunSingletonImg
    Basic implementation for "function apply to singleton set image" f[{E}]
    He
     
    HeL1
    Rewrites an equality and hides the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier.
    HeL2
    Rewrites an equality and hides or deselects the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier.
    HypOr
     
    ImpCase
    Generates a proof rule for Case distinction for a given implicative hypothesis.
    ImpE
    Generates a proof rule for modus ponens for a given implicative hypothesis.
    ImpHypothesisReasoner
    Common implementation for reasoners that works on an implicative hypothesis.
    ImpI
     
    IsFunGoal
    A reasoner that generates proof rules that discharge a goal of the form E : T1 -/-> T2 where E is an expression, and T1 and T2 are type expressions.
    ModusTollens
    Generates a proof rule for modus tollens for a given implicative hypothesis.

    This class implements the algorithm for instantiating one or several bound identifier in a quantified predicate.

    OnePointProcessor<T extends Formula<T>>
    Framework for handling one point rules.
    OnePointProcessorInference
    Handles the processing for inference rules ONE_POINT_L and ONE_POINT_R.
    OnePointProcessorRewriting
    Handles the processing for rewriting rules SIMP_IN_COMPSET and SIMP_IN_COMPSET_ONEPOINT.
    OnePointRule
    Generates a proof rule for one point rules ONE_POINT_L and ONE_POINT_R.
